title: NPC Profile
description: MetaCampus NPC profile data structure constraint for individual NPC objects. The top-level data file (data/npcs.json) is an array of these objects.

npc_id.description: Unique NPC identifier in snake_case (e.g. parent_001, teacher_class_001)

display_name.description: Human-readable NPC display name shown in game UI

role.description: NPC role in the game (e.g. 家长, 招生老师, 班主任)

location.description: Location ID where NPC resides, must match a valid location_id in data/locations.json

personality.description: NPC personality trait descriptors (minimum 2 traits required)

core_conflict.description: The central dilemma or conflict that drives this NPC's narrative arc

primary_metric.description: The primary game metric this NPC's interactions most directly affect

secondary_metric.description: Optional secondary metric also affected by this NPC. Must be different from primary_metric.

quest_ids.description: Quest IDs associated with this NPC (minimum 1, snake_case prefixed with q_)

visual_keywords.description: Keywords describing NPC visual appearance for art reference (e.g. ['medium build', 'glasses', 'blue uniform'])

voice_tone.description: Tone of voice for NPC dialogue writing (e.g. 温和耐心, 严厉认真, 热情奔放)

forbidden_behavior.description: Description of behaviors this NPC must never exhibit (safety constraint)

positive.description: Metric increase when player makes good choices with this NPC

negative.description: Metric decrease when player makes poor choices with this NPC

metric_effects.description: Metric impact mapping. Keys are context identifiers (e.g. on_quest_complete, on_fail, or metric IDs), values define positive/negative effect magnitudes.

name.description: [Legacy] Alias for display_name, deprecated in favor of display_name

dialogue_id.description: [Asset] Dialogue tree identifier linking to data/dialogues.json

indicator_tint.description: [Asset] Hex color code for NPC interaction indicator
